message:
feat(gateway): update checkpoints routes to use canonical response envelope

- Refactor all checkpoint endpoints to use sendResource, sendList, sendError helpers
- Update error handler to use sendError, sendValidationError, sendInternalError
- Add proper object types: checkpoint, checkpoint_restoration, checkpoint_export, etc.
- Include HATEOAS links in resource responses
- Remove direct getCorrelationId usage (handled by helpers)
- All 31 checkpoint tests passing

Closes flywheel_gateway-9t0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
